{{Infobox concept
| name = Striker
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Striker Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Striker technique]] is a method of projecting [[madra]] outward from the body to perform individual attacks. These techniques are characterized by their ability to launch power through the air, often manifesting as various shapes such as beams of light, fireballs, serpents, or projectiles. While they can be used with weapons like swords, spears, or bows, they are also performed through direct physical motions. [[Striker techniques]] vary significantly in power and effect; some serve as illusions of pain or visual distractions, while others are lethal, capable of dissolving targets into [[essence]] or causing massive physical destruction. Within certain disciplines, such as the [[Path of the White Fox]], specific variations like foxfire can be utilized to inflict spiritual pain without causing actual physical damage. While some practitioners may find these techniques slower or less efficient than other methods, they are essential for engaging enemies at a distance and can be integrated into complex combat strategies alongside other specialized techniques.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Striker]] is a soul type characterized by the arrow symbol and strikes against rivals from a distance.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1">''Unsouled'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Striker]] is a technique used to throw [[madra]] out of a [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Empty Palm]] is considered a rotten [[Striker]] move.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Striker]] is a move used by [[bandits]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Striker]] is a technique used by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Striker]] is a type of technique.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Strikers can produce foxfire.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The wall forces the use of [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Striker]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Striker]] is a rough technique.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Striker]] is a technique [[Lindon]] can use with condensed black fire.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[The Lady]] hurls her [[Striker technique]] at the two humans.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] used a half-formed [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Striker technique]] was used to follow up an attack on the [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Striker]] is a technique used by Highgolds.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Striker technique]] can blast at an opponent's eyes.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Striker]] is a technique that can be released from a weapon or a hand.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Striker technique]] looks like lightning hammered straight.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Striker]] is a technique involving five needle-points of [[sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Striker technique]] can destroy arrows.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses huge [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Strikers are part of the combatants.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Striker technique]] slammed into [[Tiberian's Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Striker]] is a technique used by Archlords.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Noroloth]] matches a [[Striker technique]] with [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|And when I throw madra out of my sword? “Striker.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“It’s a rotten Striker move, then, but a runty cub is still a tiger.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
